TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Giorgi_Margvelashvili, title = Giorgi_Margvelashvili, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Giorgi_Margvelashvili} }

S.FORM: Giorgi Margvelashvili ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 9, Giorgi Margvelashvili, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Georgia ta' misuw hya' ga Giorgi Margvelashvili, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Giorgi Margvelashvili ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 9, Giorgi Margvelashvili, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Georgia ta' misuw hya' ga Giorgi Margvelashvili, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ɣiorɣi marɣ*elas~ɕħ*ili rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ɣiorɣi marɣ*elas~ɕħ*ili, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣeorɣia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ɣiorɣi marɣ*elas~ɕħ*ili, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
